html:
Your Personalized Recovery Plan

Rachel’s shedding came in waves after a long stretch of stress, and that pattern can leave the follicles cycling unevenly. Now that the stress period is behind her, the focus shifts to steadying and nourishing those re‑awakening roots. This protocol builds deeper recovery—anchoring sleep, calming the stress response, and rebuilding nutrients—to move her from early regrowth toward lasting strength. Each small, consistent action re‑teaches her hair and body that stability is the new normal. 🌱

Consistency now turns those baby hairs into full strands of confidence.
